description_long: This object is a realistic depiction of a fried egg, featuring a slightly irregular, white, opaque egg white that spreads out in a thin, uneven layer. At the center, there is a raised, circular yolk with a gradient of yellow to orange, giving it a natural, cooked appearance. The edges of the egg white are jagged and organic, mimicking the way a real egg spreads when cooked on a flat surface. The surface of the egg white appears matte with subtle variations in shading, while the yolk has a glossier, smoother finish. There are no visible cracks, burn marks, or additional toppings, and the overall form is flat and low in height. The coloration is simple, with the white and yolk colors being the most prominent visual features.
description: A flat, realistic fried egg with a white, unevenly spread egg white and a glossy yellow-orange yolk at the center.
description_view_0: The egg is seen from a low angle, highlighting the raised yolk and the irregular, jagged edge of the egg white.
description_view_1: This view shows the egg from a slightly different angle, emphasizing the flatness of the egg white and the central position of the yolk.
description_view_2: The yolk appears more centered and the uneven, organic outline of the egg white is clearly visible.
description_view_3: The egg is viewed from another side, showing the smooth transition between the white and yolk, with the yolk slightly off-center.
attribute_orientation: lying flat with the yolk facing upward
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a breakfast or meal setting, served on a plate or tray.
